description: AI-powered data analytics for exploring datasets, performing statistical analysis, and generating actionable insights

agents.name: Data Explorer
agents.description: Discovers and profiles data sources, assesses data quality, and identifies key variables for analysis

agents.name: Statistical Analyst
agents.description: Performs statistical tests, builds regression models, and detects significant patterns in datasets

agents.name: Insight Generator
agents.description: Synthesizes analytical findings into actionable business insights with visualization recommendations
